message:
feat(fp-frame): to_dict dict dup-index rejection + DataFrame.empty property (frankenpandas-rs33)

Two hygiene improvements on the to_dict surface plus the pandas
.empty property:

- to_dict(orient='dict') now rejects duplicate index labels
  (pandas raises ValueError; previous implementation silently
  overwrote collisions via BTreeMap::insert and lost rows). Matches
  the existing policy on to_dict(orient='index') and
  to_json(orient='dict'/'columns'/'index').
- DataFrame::empty() — pandas-style "empty" property: true iff the
  frame has zero rows OR zero columns. Stricter than the existing
  is_empty() which only checks rows. A frame with rows but no
  columns counts as empty in pandas because there are no values
  to operate on.

Three tests added: dict dup-index rejection, empty on zero-rows,
empty on zero-columns + is_empty contrast, empty false on
non-trivial frame.

Co-lands frankenpandas-f0m0 (empty property). iduz (series) and
c5ok (to_json columns) closed separately — the former doesn't
require rejection (series values already support duplicate index)
and the latter is already implemented at fp-frame/src/lib.rs:19897.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
